calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-11-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laticia Perez.
Petitioner: Su Juan Yu (not present) and Run Hong Li, present in pro per for the minor: Jie Zhen Li, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Jenny Jie Zhen Li.
Decree signed in open court.
